changes.reason: Removing a field breaks all consumers that read it.
Adding an optional field is backwards-compatible.

migration_checklist: === BREAKING CHANGES — require version bump and consumer migration ===
[ ] REMOVE field 'id': notify all consumers to stop reading this field.
=== COMPATIBLE CHANGES — no consumer action required ===
[✓] NEW optional field '_new_optional_field' (string) — consumers may adopt at leisure.
